chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-2941 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.12998/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objections 3. For order on CMA No.12999/2025 4. For order on CMA No.13000/2025 5. For hearing of main case 26.06.2025 M/s. Saathi M. Ishaq and S.K. Lodhi, advocate for petitioner ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption granted but subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Respondent No.3, who reportedly is uncle of petitioner filed an application before Excise & Taxation Officer & Motor Registration Authority complaining that his vehicle bearing registration No.KW-7332, has been wrongly transferred in the name of petitioner. This complaint has been registered and through impugned notice dated 16.06.2025 petitioner has been directed to appear before the aforesaid authority of Excise Department for a personal hearing. Learned counsel submits that petitioner is apprehending some coercive action when he appears before said authority today. He, therefore, seeks protection. Notice to the respondents as well as learned AG Sindh for 20.08.2025. Let, petitioner appear before the aforesaid authority in terms of impugned notice, however, no coercive action shall be taken against him till the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
